name: Majestic Gold Corp.
description: Majestic Gold Corp. is a Canadian-listed gold producer operating the Songjiagou open-pit gold mine in Shandong Province, eastern China, along with the Mujin Gold Project in the same region. The company is a small-scale producer, having recently resumed operations at Mujin after a temporary suspension, and continues to advance production at Songjiagou. Majestic also holds exploration-stage properties in Australia and Canada.
